entities.name: BACILLUS THURINGIENSIS
entities.description: Soil bacterium that produces Cry proteins

entities.name: CHRYSOSPORIUM SP.
entities.description: Soil fungus that produces extracellular proteases capable of degrading Cry1Ac toxin

entities.name: CRY1AC TOXIN
entities.description: An insecticidal protein produced by Bacillus thuringiensis

entities.name: HELICOVERPA ARMIGERA
entities.description: An insect species targeted by the Cry1Ac toxin

entities.name: EXTRACELLULAR PROTEASES
entities.description: Enzymes produced by Chrysosporium sp. that degrade the Cry1Ac toxin

entities.name: INSECTICIDAL ACTIVITY
entities.description: The ability of a toxin to kill target insects

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL SOILS
entities.description: The environment where Bt proteins persist and soil fungi are screened

entities.name: DEGRADATION
entities.description: The process of breaking down the Cry1Ac toxin into inactive products
